1.premise: A driver whose name conflicts with rider expectations can make Uber pickup suspicion sound racist.
A masculine driver with a feminine name makes Uber suspicion sound racist.

2.premise: Questioning car ownership implies shared theft, not rider caution.
Being high can scramble parental and work responsibilities into wrong allegiances and captivity.

1.premise: Being high can make parental support go to the opponent.

2.premise: What if forgetting an Uber passenger turned them into a roommate.

lines.text: - Oh man.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Y'all know how hard it is to drive Uber
lines.label: setup

lines.text: when you're a big black dude named Courtney?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: People don't believe it's my car.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I had a lady once go, are you sure this is your car?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: You know, you hear a joke and you think she's playing,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but she's like.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And because I'm a comic, I'm all like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: no, we stole this motherfucker together, let's go!
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Happy Black History Month, by the way.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: All right, so anyways, I'm recently
lines.label: setup

lines.text: taking a tolerance break from weed.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I don't hate weed.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I just don't like the things that I do when I'm on it.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like I'll go to my son's basketball game
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and cheer for the wrong team.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I also do stupid things like forget I'm driving Uber.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Have a passenger in the backseat just terrified.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm like, I'm about to have a roommate.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I think that's about it y'all, thank you.
lines.label: fluff
